posts.content:
A “Neural Computer” is built by adapting video generation architectures to train a World Model of an actual computer that can directly simulate a computer interface.

Paper: arxiv.org/abs/2604.06425
Code: github.com/metauto-ai/N...

Cool work led by Mingchen Zhuge et al. from Schmidhuber’s lab!

xPosts.content: David Ha @hardmaru and team are super practical scientifically research driven geniuses . And this is amazing to see ‍ ‍
xPosts.highlights: A third party praises David Ha (@hardmaru) and his team for being practical, scientifically research-driven geniuses.
xPosts.worthReading: It provides external validation of David Ha's work and approach in AI/technical research.

interestSummary: David Ha is focused on practical, research-driven AI, specifically exploring world models and neural computers that can simulate computer interfaces.
